issues.message: This still describes raw React usage as `FieldButton.Root` + `FieldButton.Button`, but the input-button slot context is actually provided by `FieldButton.Control`. `Button`/`Value`/`Placeholder` all rely on `useClassNames()`, so the examples below will throw or lose the input-button root styling without a `Control` wrapper.

This comment does not resolve the previously reported `--json` backward-compat break: `diffComponents()` still emits only the new kebab-case `status` enum values, so any consumer that relied on the legacy status strings remains broken.

The package-name fix is still incomplete: this snippet imports a monochrome icon from `@daangn/...`. Because these docs are copied from code blocks, all import examples should use `@karrotmarket/...` and explain the old package in prose if needed.

Adding `status: rootage-only` here creates a second source of truth that the sync script does not honor. Running `node scripts/sync-from-seed.mjs --json --upstream /tmp/seed-design-sync` still reports `components.radio` as `{"status":"ported"}` because `ROOTAGE_ONLY_COMPONENTS` only special-cases `text-button`.
